sources.title: FHIR R5 List
notes: List is a curated collection of resources.
List can represent curated point-in-time allergy or medication snapshots.

sources.title: FHIR R5 AllergyIntolerance
notes: Risk of adverse response associated with exposure to a substance.
Used as patient safety tool in medication workflows.

sources.title: FHIR R5 MedicationStatement
notes: Record of medication being taken by a patient.
Commonly used in intake and active medication summaries.
